creator: stephon@gmail.com
text:
Hello all

After some testing,
it seems that CPU (E5-2603) uses some unsupported instructions in FreeBSD
8.3-Release,
for it builds perfectly under 9.1-RELEASE.

Would you like to mark this PR as invalid.
Sorry for bothering you.


--
Stephon, Bo-Chong Chen
System Engineer
PIXNET Digital Media Corp.
email: stephon@gmail.com
